name: villager_male_01
subject: a friendly Indian villager character standing and facing the viewer: simple round head, black dot eyes, small content smile, wearing a plain cream kurta and dhoti with a charcoal waist sash, simple bare feet, arms relaxed at his sides
notes: generic narrator/worker; rig with parenting + puppet pins

name: villager_heads_01
subject: an expression sheet: the SAME simple round male character head repeated three times in a horizontal row, identical size and evenly spaced — first neutral, second happy smiling, third worried with raised eyebrows; black dot eyes, short charcoal hair
notes: 3-head expression sheet; mask/duplicate per head in AE, swap onto villager body

name: raja_01
subject: an Indian raja (king) character standing and facing the viewer: simple round head wearing a saffron-ochre (#D4812A) turban with a small jewel, thin charcoal mustache, black dot eyes, calm proud expression, long ochre royal robe over a cream tunic, arms relaxed

name: soldier_spear_01
subject: a medieval Indian foot-soldier character standing at rest, facing the viewer: simple round head under a simple rounded metal helmet, black dot eyes, neutral expression, cream tunic with a charcoal leather chest strap, holding one upright vertical spear in one hand and a small round sand-colored shield in the other
notes: duplicate + stagger in AE for armies (ask Claude for the JSX)

name: elephant_war_01
subject: a war elephant standing in full side profile facing left: simple flat shapes, warm grey-brown body, one small kind eye, an ornamental saffron-ochre (#D4812A) head cloth and matching back blanket with a thin cream border, tusks in cream
notes: side profile — flip horizontally in AE for right-facing

name: tree_banyan_01
subject: a single large banyan tree: broad layered canopy in muted sage green (#9C9F77) with simple cloud-like lobes, a thick shadow-brown (#B09878) trunk with two thin aerial roots hanging from the branches

name: tree_palm_01
subject: a single palm tree with a slightly curved shadow-brown (#B09878) trunk with thin ring marks, topped by simple muted sage-green (#9C9F77) fronds

name: cloud_01
subject: a single soft flat-design cloud in cream (#FAF7F2) with a subtle warm sand-toned shadow on its underside, simple rounded lobes
notes: drift slowly with a position expression; duplicate at different scales

name: rocks_01
subject: a small cluster of three smooth desert boulders of different sizes in sand tones (#E8D8C0 with #B09878 shading), sitting together

name: fort_tower_01
subject: a small square sandstone fort watchtower in warm sand tones (#F0D8B0, #E8D8C0) with crenellated battlements on top and one dark arched window, clean precise stone-course lines
notes: matches scene-still isometric angle; can sit inside scene compositions

name: water_pot_01
subject: ONLY a single round clay water pot (matka), floating alone: warm terracotta body with sand-tone (#E8D8C0) highlights and shadow-brown (#B09878) shading, a narrow neck, a slightly flared rim, two thin charcoal decorative rings around its widest part — no ground, no base, no platform, no scene, no architecture, absolutely nothing else
notes: Chand Baori prop; also generic Indian-village dressing

name: arrow_curved_01
subject: a single bold hand-drawn curved motion arrow sweeping from lower-left to upper-right, with a tapering tail and a clean solid triangular head, drawn in one single solid saffron-ochre color (#D4812A)
notes: Oversimplified-style map arrow; for animated draw-on ask Claude for the stroke-reveal recipe (AE shape layers are the scalable alternative)
